description.zh: 聚焦椭圆曲线、数字签名与现代密码学原语。
description.en: Elliptic curves, signatures, and the core primitives of modern cryptography.

description.zh: 从握手流程、密钥协商到协议版本演进，拆解实际网络协议。
description.en: Handshake flows, key exchange, and how real-world network protocols evolve.

description.zh: 关注签名校验、密钥管理与生产环境里的安全边界。
description.en: Signature verification, key management, and production security boundaries.

description.zh: 围绕限流、熔断、容量保护等生产级服务治理实践。
description.en: Rate limiting, circuit breaking, and capacity protection for production services.

description.zh: 处理幂等、重试、消息一致性与跨服务状态协调。
description.en: Idempotency, retries, message consistency, and cross-service coordination.

name.zh: 密码学原语与应用解析

description.zh: 从 ECDSA、TLS 到 JWT，沿着协议栈梳理现代安全通信中最关键的原语。
description.en: From ECDSA and TLS to JWT, this series follows the protocol stack behind modern secure communication.

description.zh: 从限流、幂等到失败恢复，总结生产级后端服务必须具备的生存策略。
description.en: A production-oriented series on rate limiting, idempotency, and failure recovery.

description.zh: 从基础语法、源代码以及生态等角度对 Rust 语言进行的探索。
description.en: An exploration of the Rust language from the perspectives of basic syntax, source code, and its ecosystem.

title.zh: Go 服务限流的几种落地模式
title.en: Practical Rate Limiting Patterns for Go Services

summary.zh: 网关、服务节点与 Redis 三层限流如何分工，以及令牌桶和滑动窗口在高并发场景里的取舍。
summary.en: How to divide rate limiting across gateway, service nodes, and Redis, and when to choose token bucket vs. sliding window.

summary.zh: 总结 FLP 不可能性
summary.en: 总结 FLP 不可能性

title.zh: JWT 签名校验中的常见陷阱
title.en: Common Pitfalls in JWT Signature Verification

summary.zh: 算法白名单、`kid` 轮换、时钟漂移与多租户密钥隔离，是 JWT 在生产环境里最容易踩坑的四个点。
summary.en: Algorithm allowlists, `kid` rotation, clock skew, and tenant key isolation are four of the most common JWT traps in production.

title.zh: 分布式系统的幂等性清单
title.en: An Idempotency Checklist for Distributed Systems

summary.zh: 只靠“重试可安全执行”远远不够，幂等键、状态机和副作用隔离才是落地关键。
summary.en: Idempotency is more than safe retries; the hard parts are keys, state transitions, and isolating side effects.

title.zh: 非对称加密与 TLS 演进

summary.zh: 从 RSA 密钥交换到 ECDHE 前向保密，再到后量子密码学：TLS 协议二十年演进中的关键转折。
summary.en: From RSA key exchange to ECDHE forward secrecy and post-quantum experiments: the turning points in TLS across twenty years.

summary.zh: 深入解析椭圆曲线数字签名算法（ECDSA）的数学原理、签名与验证流程，以及常见安全考量。
summary.en: A deep dive into the mathematics behind ECDSA, covering signing, verification, and practical security considerations.
